bonsai-orchestrator.description: Process orchestrator for Context Bonsai forward-port cycles. Coordinates developer/reviewer/judge subagents; never implements directly.

bonsai-developer.description: Developer subagent for forward-port cycle work. Operates per .llm-conductor/DEVELOPER_SUBAGENTS.md as instructed in its task prompt.

bonsai-reviewer.description: Adversarial reviewer subagent for forward-port cycle work. Operates per .llm-conductor/REVIEWER_SUBAGENTS.md as instructed in its task prompt.

bonsai-judge.description: Review judge subagent for forward-port cycle work. Operates per .llm-conductor/REVIEW_JUDGE_SUBAGENTS.md as instructed in its task prompt.
